mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, template_code, template_name, disease_code, plan_schema, status, version_no, created_by, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM care_plan_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO care_plan_template ( tenant_id, template_code, template_name, disease_code, plan_schema, status, version_no, created_by ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{diseaseCode}, #{planSchema, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{versionNo}, #{createdBy} )
